sizing_rule.note: Position size derived from optimal f = (AHPR - 1) / GHPR. Requires calculation of arithmetic mean HPR and geometric mean HPR from probability distribution of underlying price movements. Specific f value not provided in excerpt, must be calculated from trade history.

source_rule_text: Position sizing should be derived from optimal f, calculated using the geometric mean HPR (GHPR) and arithmetic mean HPR (AHPR) to maximize long-term growth while accounting for probability distributions of underlying price movements.
